Why Tankua

Everything You Need for Your Perfect Tour

From discovery to booking to travel, we've got you covered every step of the way.

Discover Amazing Destinations

Explore hundreds of tours across Ethiopia - from adventure treks to cultural experiences.

Easy Booking

Book your perfect tour in minutes with our intuitive app and secure payment system.

Verified Providers

Travel with confidence using our network of vetted and experienced tour operators.

Digital Tickets

Access your QR-coded tickets instantly on your phone - no printing needed.

How It Works

Book Your Tour in 3 Simple Steps

Planning your perfect trip has never been easier.

01

Choose Your Destination

Browse our collection of over 250 tours across Ethiopia and find the perfect experience for your adventure.

02

Select a Provider

Pick from verified travel providers with ratings and reviews to ensure a quality experience.

03

Book & Pay Securely

Complete your booking with Chapa, Telebirr, or other payment methods and receive your QR ticket instantly.
